name: Mystery / Noir
description: Rain-slicked streets, unreliable clients, and truths nobody wants dug up.
style: Hard-boiled noir tone. First-person-adjacent grit, terse sentences, dry wit. Clues matter: reference established facts and keep continuity of suspects, motives, and lies. Atmosphere over gore.
premise_seeds: A private eye takes one last case: find who is sending the mayor photographs of a crime that officially never happened.
The city's best forger is found dead holding a painting everyone insists was never painted.
A detective's estranged partner reappears with amnesia and a briefcase neither of them can open.

beats.name: Disclose the Mystery
beats.guidance: Introduce the central puzzle or crime that drives the story; hook with the mystery itself.

beats.name: Set the Sleuth on the Path
beats.guidance: Establish the investigator and why this case is naturally, personally theirs.

beats.name: Introduce the Subplot
beats.guidance: Open a secondary thread — a relationship or personal stake — that deepens character alongside the case.

beats.name: Facts About Suspects
beats.guidance: Introduce the suspects, their ties to the victim, and their possible motives.

beats.name: Broaden the Investigation
beats.guidance: Expand beyond first interviews: new locations, records, physical evidence.

beats.name: Sleuth's Background
beats.guidance: Reveal the investigator's relevant history — why they work the way they do, and what this case costs them.

beats.name: Reveal Hidden Motives
beats.guidance: Concealed connections and motives surface; initial assumptions start to crack.

beats.name: Reveal Results
beats.guidance: The sleuth lands on a preliminary theory — plausible, confident, and subtly wrong.

beats.name: Review the Case
beats.guidance: New evidence breaks the false solution; the investigation pivots.

beats.name: Weigh the Evidence
beats.guidance: With fresh insight, weigh everything and assemble the true final theory.

beats.name: Subplot Resolution
beats.guidance: Close the secondary thread before the main reveal.

beats.name: Climax
beats.guidance: The dramatic confrontation reveals the full solution — how, who, and why.
